test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient for this documentation-only subtask: tester artifacts record `cd tests/tactical && make -s && ./TacticalTests` -> `OK (69 tests)`, and the cited tactical tests align with the design-note framing of wx delegation coverage versus direct canonical outcome coverage.
documentation_accuracy_summary: doc/DesignNotes.md accurately frames the shipped Milestone 8 state versus later remediation, separates the two blocking runtime bugs from the accepted manual GUI limitation, and distinguishes wx delegation coverage from direct FTacticalGame::completeMovePhase() outcome coverage.
